summary: Test suite has solid foundation with good organization and coverage of main happy paths (secret classification, report generation, both output formats). However, it lacks rigor in error scenario testing (malformed JSON, invalid dates, missing required fields) and some edge cases (negative policies, null values, leap years). The act test harness only validates one fixture case with basic string matching rather than deep structural validation. Boundary condition testing is good (warning window, exactly-expired), but concurrent scenarios and format-specific output validation are missing. Would catch regressions in core logic but would miss many edge cases and error paths.
